objective: Make development tool availability explicit before repairs or automation.

records.policy: Use uv for Python project work.
Expose npm and npx through controlled PATH or user symlinks before MCP repair.
records.known_gap: node present, npm/npx missing from PATH

records.policy: Use docker compose, not standalone docker-compose.
Classify snap-backed command failures as environment-level until repaired.
Run daemon health check before local model workflows.

completion_gate: Toolchain authority records distinguish available, missing, partial, and degraded tools with validation commands.
